name: Mexican Chicken (Pollo Mexicano)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chilli powder with the celery salt, brown sugar, red wine vinegar, Worcestershire sauce, tomato ketchup, chicken stock, and tabasco sauce in a bowl.
2. Score the skin of the chicken on all sides.
3. Place the chicken breasts in a flameproof baking dish.
4. Pour the chilli mixture over the chicken.
5. Place under high heat grill for 5 minutes.
6. Reduce the heat to medium and cook each side for 10 minutes, basting with the chilli sauce frequently.
7. Transfer the chicken to a warmed serving dish.
8. Spoon any remaining sauce from the grill pan over the chicken.
9. Top each portion with a generous dollop of natural yoghurt.
10. Garnish with coriander or parsley sprigs and serve with a salad.
Calories: 240 per serving
